subcodes.first_line: The world hath been adorned through the advent of the Ancient King, yet the peoples remain in a wondrous delusion, having cast behind them the signs of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تزین العالم بظهور مالک القدم ولکن الامم فی وهم عجاب قد نبذوا آیات الله عن
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital
